div.span:
Maker Fund OBX SwapOut to K
refund=B, bind R,T, unlock h

Taker: OBX SwapOut on-chain
and valid? K, amount, window, R, T

Taker Lock real XNO
to joint sA+sB account

Maker: lock pays joint key
exact agreed amount?

Wait UnlockHeight
Maker Refund OBX via timelock
Taker BuildClaim -> ClaimRequest core hash + s_a

Taker aggregate s_a+s_b
adapt with sA, verify under K

Taker mine OBX claim
takes OBX, publishes S_full reveals sA

Maker scrape on-chain claim
extract sA = S_full - s_a - s_b

Maker Sweep real XNO
joint -> maker address
